charter: The HTTP surface: route handlers, request/response DTOs, dependency-injection helpers, and middleware. Prime sites for copy-paste endpoint variants, schema/model shape drift, dead routes, and inconsistent error handling.
Business logic and the SQLModel ORM layer. Prime sites for duplicated rules, god-modules, lying flags/docstrings, dead branches, and frontend/backend shape drift.
The service layer (email, encryption, wallet, streaks, LLM usage, check-ins) plus security utilities. Prime sites for stubbed integrations, swallowed exceptions, and logic duplicated from domain/.

App wiring and operations: main, database, seeds, rate limiting, observability, Sentry, content config. Owns every backend/src top-level module NOT claimed by another backend scan. Prime sites for config drift, dead seed data, and copy-paste seed scripts.
The Today tab: daily dashboard screens, components, and hooks.
The Habits tab: habit list, creation/editing flows, streak display.
The Practice tab: ritual engine, cue scheduling, mode views, session flows. The largest feature area — watch for god-components and engine/view layering violations.
The Course tab: 36-week APTITUDE program reading, stage content, and progress.
The Journal tab: entry composition, prompted journaling, marginalia.
The Map tab: stage/wheel visualization and program navigation.
The app's entry and account surfaces: Auth, Welcome, and Settings screens, the AuthContext (JWT lifecycle), and React Navigation wiring.

Shared frontend infrastructure: API client + types, Candle & Ink design system, shared components, Zustand stores, AsyncStorage persistence, hooks, and utilities. The prime cross-feature duplication and dead-export site.
